findings.issue: Empty despite recent built_at timestamp — agents are simulating on stale or missing codebase data. This matches CANONICAL MEMORY Class 3: solo execution risk when index is stale (>7d) or empty.
findings.recommended_fix: Rebuild immediately; verify builder isn't failing silently. Check if packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py was moved or broken during archive refactor.

whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: Empty code-index forces swarm to operate blind — violates Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) by blocking adaptive verification across all 5 products. Atlas cannot govern what it cannot see.
